revision.comment: Reorganized alphabetically. Please keep it this way when adding entries.
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Infobox_deity/color]]: importing template for usage here
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Infobox_deity/color]]: importing for the meme
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23460549766|manual triggered pipeline]]
